items.title: [reliability] state-scanner collect_openspec 布局不符时静默全零 — 消费方 OpenSpec 维度假绿 8 周 (+2 个连带盲区)
[reliability] GitHub 镜像漏推第三次复发 — 子模块服务端合并 + gitlink bump 无序 → orphaned gitlink (clone --recursive 断裂)
aria 初始化: 第三方项目指令文件加入'aria 工具问题优先上报而非自解决'约定 (advisory 建议)
[credentials] 确认 aria-runner-bot / aria-runner-bot-prod-20260523-v2-full-scope 两个 10cg-ci-bot token 是否 Aria 项目所有
[M6-blocker] Layer 1 runtime 降级: 主 tick processed:0 + gateway LLM 打 z.ai 死账户(应走 Luxeno) + Feishu 凭据失效 + 多处 stale deploy
[security] cost-sentinel 在 INFO 日志打印完整 Feishu webhook URL (secret-in-logs) — 轮换 + 脱敏
M7: aria-fleet implementation tracker (deferred from 2026-05-27 brainstorm DEC)
[adoption] Switch aria-runner build: aria-build container workaround → aether-build-container skill (v1.10.9 GA)
propose: 三档 dispatch payload 作为 aria-orchestrator v2.0 (Phase 3c) reference 实现
[Feature] Pulse 项目集成 — AI-native 通讯层 (Matrix + Conduit + Element)
[state-scanner] sync_status 撒谎: 陈旧 remote-tracking ref 下报 parity=equal / overall_parity=true (十步循环统一入口的假绿)
[coordination follow-up] claim 强制点 (Phase B) 在重复成本点 (issue-pick/Phase A) 下游 — 双子星撞车亲历者反馈
[coordination follow-up] heartbeat 生产接线 — heartbeat_at 冻结在 acquire, SWEEP_TTL 被迫 24h
[feature] secret-scan 防御反馈闭环 — 泄露事件记录 → aria-report 人工闸门 issue → 升级 PreToolUse (B, split from #91)
[coordination] 自主 bot dispatch 时强制 claim — defect a 的 Layer 2 维度 (插件管不到)
feat: abstract reusable "Hermes on Aether" deployment template

✅ **Approved** (owner sign-off 2026-07-03; Phase A.2 post_spec CONVERGED via R3 unanimous PASS; **Phase A.3 agent 分配 LOCKED 2026-07-04** — `detailed-tasks.yaml` 30 tasks [backend-architect 21 / qa-engineer 4 / knowledge-manager 5], 1:1 对 tasks.md 30 项 + verification↔AC 映射; 经 mid_post_spec dogfood 修正; owner 全权归本侧后采用此细粒度版 supersede 早前 20-task; **post_planning R1→R2 CONVERGED 2026-07-04** [6 Major+minors fixed, R2 5/5 PASS; 首个 post_planning gate per DEC-20260704-001]; ready for Phase B.1)

**Approved** (Phase A.2 CONVERGED 2026-05-24 via R3 stability check)。**代码侧完成** (TG-A obs + TG-B [REWORKED per #138, 2026-06-01] + acceptance 脚本; TG-B 产物: crash-recovery-coverage-matrix + 2 测试文件)。**未归档**: 待 168h 运营跑 (TG-A 7d 数据 + TG-C 样本依赖之; 前置见 Aria #147 阻塞链)。
✅ **Approved** (Phase A.2 CONVERGED 2026-05-25 via R3 stability check; ready for Phase A.3 → Phase B.1)

✅ **Approved** (owner sign-off 2026-06-18; Phase A.2 post_spec R1→R2 **CONVERGED** [R2 unanimous PASS 3/3]; **Phase A.3 agent 分配 LOCKED 2026-06-19** (无新 agent, 现有 roster 覆盖; 见 tasks.md §Phase A.3)。**Phase B 受 D3 时机门 — M6 release-closeout ship 后方可开**)
